meta.name: John Evans
meta.description: Passionate about creating innovative solutions and bringing ideas to life through engineering and code.

skills.summary: C# .NET 8/9, Angular 19, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, SCSS/CSS, C/C++ Embedded Systems, KiCad/Eagle/Altium, SolidWorks/AutoCAD/Fusion360, Navigation, Sailing

skill.name: SQL
skill.contexts: Database design, Complex queries, Performance optimization

skill.name: HTML/CSS/SCSS
skill.contexts: Web development, Responsive design, UI/UX implementation

domain.name: Financial Technology
domain.description: 7+ years at SS&C Advent in investment management software, market data processing, tax compliance systems

domain.name: Embedded Systems
domain.description: Medical devices, audio equipment, navigation hardware, drone systems using nRF52840, Teensy, Arduino platforms

domain.name: Hardware Design
domain.description: PCB design with KiCad/Eagle/Altium, 3D modeling with SolidWorks/AutoCAD/Fusion360, audio amplifiers, power conversion

domain.name: Computer Vision
domain.description: Eye tracking systems, multi-camera processing, 154-star GitHub project, featured on Hackaday

domain.name: AI/ML
domain.description: Agent infrastructure: MCP servers published to npm and the official MCP Registry, Claude Code sidecars, autonomous agent loops, RAG platforms, AI communication systems

domain.name: Maritime Navigation
domain.description: Custom GIS software, NOAA ENC chart integration, GPS wristwatch with map view and telemetry

skill.name: Agent Infrastructure
skill.contexts: MCP server development and publishing, Claude Code sidecars, autonomous scheduled agents, Web Push PWAs, token-scoped agent APIs

skill.name: Navigation
skill.contexts: Marine navigation, Offshore passage making, Chart plotting and GPS systems

skill.name: Sailing
skill.contexts: Offshore cruising, Caribbean sailing, Boat systems and maintenance

skill.name: Manufacturing
skill.contexts: PCB assembly, Quality control, Supply chain management

skill.name: Business Development
skill.contexts: Client relationship management, Contract negotiation, Technical communication

project.title: TerrainMaps
project.subtitle: Turn Any Place on Earth into a 3D-Printed Board
project.description: A full pipeline from public-domain elevation data to a full-color 3D-printable terrain board, entirely in the browser. Search any place — or upload a GPX of a favorite ride — and watch it become a printable model with an interactive 3D preview. Free downloads, with print ordering for physical boards.

highlights.highlight: Elevation-to-3MF engine built on public-domain USGS 3DEP and NOAA terrain data
Full-color streamed 3MF generation for multi-material printing
In-browser 3D preview with remixable boards and community gallery
GPX route boards: any hike, ride, or drive becomes a physical keepsake
Golf course mode with fairway detection from public-domain NAIP imagery

project.skills: Python, Geospatial Processing, DEM/Terrain Data, 3MF/3D Printing, Web Workers, Three.js, PostgreSQL, Docker/Coolify

image.description: TerrainMaps live site showing a featured 3D golf course board
3D route board render with numbered waypoint path across island terrain
Deer Isle Maine coastline terrain processing view

project.title: Launch Engine
project.subtitle: AI Launch Co-Pilot with a Living Mind Map
project.description: A launch planning tool where an AI co-pilot and a founder share one canvas. Describe a product and the co-pilot fills out a build/market mind map, then keeps re-planning it as work happens — every action item sized to fifteen minutes so momentum never stalls.

highlights.highlight: Dual-hemisphere mind map: material (build) and immaterial (market) branches around one vision
AI co-pilot fills, re-plans, and converses per-node with persistent context
15-minute momentum system: every task completable in one sitting
Intake → invest/simulate → schedule → check-ins pipeline for full launch lifecycle
Claude Code sidecar provides the intelligence on a subscription, not per-token billing

project.skills: Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL JSONB, Claude Integration, Canvas Rendering, Docker/Coolify

image.description: Launch Engine mind map with AI co-pilot chat panel and demo product

project.title: ChartTable & Open Shannon
project.subtitle: A Personal Knowledge Base That Holds Me Accountable
project.description: A personal operating picture: 2,200+ AI conversations indexed into a 2,700-node taxonomy, served to agents over MCP, with an autonomous strategist that reviews every week's work against a 90-day plan and publishes its verdict to a token-gated iPhone app. Agents read it, write to it, and answer for it — the system only respects what's written down.

highlights.highlight: Open Shannon: MCP server + Claude Code sidecar bridging agents to the knowledge graph (23 tools)
Autonomous weekly review: a scheduled agent judges the week from live data and publishes a blunt verdict
Token-gated PWA with Web Push: the Monday memo lands on the lock screen, actions check off from the phone
URL-embedded revocable agent keys — one link carries scoped read/write for any agent or webhook
In-app conversational agent that edits projects and searches the graph in natural language

project.skills: .NET 10, Angular, PostgreSQL, MCP Protocol, Claude Code, Web Push/VAPID, Service Workers, Agent Orchestration

image.description: The Monday memo — weekly strategist verdict app with scores and next actions

project.title: Pixel Surgeon MCP
project.subtitle: AI Image Generation & Repair for Agents
project.description: An MCP server that gives any AI agent professional image capabilities: generation, editing, and surgical region repair with an interactive browser crop UI. Published on npm and the official MCP Registry.

highlights.highlight: Published on npm and the official Model Context Protocol Registry
Multi-provider: Gemini, OpenAI, and Grok image models behind one interface
Interactive region repair — browser crop UI for pixel-precise AI inpainting
Background removal, SVG tracing, video generation, and style presets
Every image in this portfolio's AI-era entries passed through it

project.skills: TypeScript, MCP Protocol, Node.js, sharp, Image Processing, npm Publishing

image.description: Pixel Surgeon MCP architecture infographic — agent, tools, providers, and the interactive crop UI
Retro-futurist Pixel Surgeon poster generated by the tool itself
Strategist app icon designed with Pixel Surgeon

project.title: Paladin
project.subtitle: AI-Powered Recruiting Platform with a Live-Call Copilot
project.description: A full-stack recruiting platform where AI sits inside the phone call: a browser call console with PBX telephony streams live audio, transcribes it in real time, and runs an intelligence overlay that analyzes the recruiting conversation as it happens — backed by a CRM that both humans and AI agents work.

highlights.highlight: Browser call console: WebSocket audio streaming over PBX telephony with real-time transcription
Live AI intelligence overlay analyzing recruiting conversations mid-call
Recruiting CRM: accounts, contacts, opportunity pipeline, email integration, activity and billing tracking
MCP server exposing the CRM to AI agents with per-recruiter scoped keys
Single codebase, per-deployment product modes for different customer types

project.skills: .NET, Angular, PBX/Telephony Integration, WebSockets, Real-Time Transcription, MCP Protocol, PostgreSQL, AI Orchestration

image.description: Paladin illustrated poster — knight helmet with headset, live transcript and pipeline

project.title: Project Viper
project.subtitle: Fine-Tuned Vision Models for Real-Time Inspection
project.description: An AI visual inspection system for high-stakes maintenance training: instructional video goes in one end, and a fine-tuned vision-language model that can evaluate a technician's work in real time comes out the other. I built the end-to-end pipeline — from raw video to trained model to automated scoring.

highlights.highlight: Automated video-to-dataset pipeline: transcription, AI semantic chunking, frame-label alignment
LoRA fine-tuning of multimodal vision-language models on local GPU infrastructure
LLM-as-judge evaluation framework scoring model outputs against ground truth
Measurable accuracy gains over base models, validated by automated evaluation
Fully reproducible: a new training video runs the whole pipeline without manual intervention

project.skills: Vision-Language Models, LoRA Fine-Tuning, Python, Unsloth, Whisper, ffmpeg, Dataset Engineering, LLM Evaluation, GPU Infrastructure

image.description: Viper technical infographic — video frame analysis flowing through a neural network to an evaluation score

project.title: Downeast Audio
project.subtitle: High-Fidelity Bluetooth Speaker Company
project.description: Founded and operated a high-fidelity bluetooth speaker company specializing in custom-designed products.

highlights.highlight: Custom CNC-designed speaker cabinets
17 revisions of in-house circuit board design
Built custom Pick-and-Place machine with custom software for PCB assembly
Multiple design patents filed and granted (USPTO)

project.skills: PCB Design, CNC Manufacturing, Firmware Development, Audio Engineering, Product Design

image.description: Full product shot with rope handle - main portfolio image
Compass rose custom engraving - signature detail

Alternate controls detail shot
Wooden box with waterproof marine speakers
Waterproof version control panel detail

project.title: Downeast Circuit Assembly
project.subtitle: Contract PCB Assembly Service
project.description: Provided rapid-turnaround PCB assembly services for medical and aerospace startups.

highlights.highlight: 2-day turnaround time for complex assemblies
Handled advanced components including 0201 parts and BGA packages
Served medical and aerospace industries

project.skills: PCB Assembly, Quality Control, Customer Service, Precision Manufacturing

image.description: Custom pick-and-place machine for PCB assembly
Purple PCB array showing multiple boards
Fine pitch connector assembly detail
PCB closeup showing component detail

project.title: JevonsCameraViewer
project.subtitle: Machine Vision Research Tool
project.description: Open-source machine vision research tool designed for sharing research rather than as a product. Featured on Hackaday.

highlights.highlight: 150+ stars on GitHub
Successfully implemented eye tracking
Featured on Hackaday
Built for research community collaboration

project.skills: Computer Vision, OpenCV, Eye Tracking, Open Source Development

image.description: Professional portrait wearing eye tracking glasses
Eye gaze tracking demonstration with outdoor scene
Cornea reflection tracking view with interface
Person wearing eye tracking glasses hardware
Eye tracking camera hardware prototype on safety glasses

project.title: Advanced Parachute Altimeter Watch
project.subtitle: Multi-Sensor Wearable with Vector Map Display
project.description: Custom-designed wearable altimeter for parachuting operations, later pivoted to sailing navigation. Features advanced GIS rendering and multi-sensor integration.

highlights.highlight: Custom NRF52840-based circuit board design
Multi-sensor integration: barometric altimeter, IMU, GPS, temperature, humidity
Lithium polymer battery management system
Sharp 400x270px memory LCD display
Custom GIS rendering engine: compressed vector maps from OSM data
Multi-resolution map rendering with dynamic zoom levels
Bluetooth sync with mobile app for track data and map updates
NOAA ENC nautical chart interpretation for sailing mode
Dynamic text and symbol rendering based on display mode

project.skills: Embedded Systems, nRF52 Development, Battery Management, GIS/Mapping, OSM Data Processing, NOAA ENC, Display Drivers, Bluetooth LE, Firmware Optimization

image.description: PCB with colorful ribbon cable
Purple PCB held in hand showing components
Wrist display showing map interface
Florida OSM vector map rendering demonstration
Detailed Maine coastline map with vector data
Florida map with nautical depth rendering
Altimeter PCB design detail
Altimeter PCB back layout
Altimeter PCB red layout design

project.title: Complete Sailboat Systems Refit
project.subtitle: 40+ Projects: Electrical, Mechanical, and Cruising Preparation
project.description: Complete restoration and modernization of a cruising sailboat, including major electrical, mechanical, and systems upgrades. Sailed from Tampa, FL to Grenada via the Bahamas and Caribbean.

highlights.highlight: 400W solar system installation
Xantrex inverter/charger integration
LiFePO4 battery bank design and installation
Complete 115V AC system rewiring
LED lighting conversion throughout
Marine sensor network reorganization and accessibility improvements
Engine wet muffler and exhaust system replacement
Engine mount replacement
Complete fuel line and filter system replacement
Generator raw water pump system rebuild
Air conditioning circulatory pump and bleed line installation
Radar repair: complete signal wire replacement
Refrigerator/freezer digital conversion
Starlink satellite internet with custom transom mount
Stanchion and railing repairs
Canvas and sail cover rebuilds
Sprayhood addition
Windlass gearbox replacement with improved serviceability
Boom gooseneck replacement
Boom mainsheet block mount replacement
Traveler bearing replacement
Mainsail cover and lazy jack replacement
Custom cabinetry for aft storage compartments
Folding salon table with center storage and bed conversion
Built-in grill installation
Tampa to Jacksonville
Jacksonville to Abacos, Bahamas
Abacos to St. Augustine
St. Augustine to Little Deer Isle, Maine
Return to Jacksonville
Jacksonville to St. Croix via Bahamas, Turks and Caicos, Dominican Republic, Puerto Rico
St. Croix to Grenada via St. Martin, St. Barths, Mt. Serrat, Guadeloupe, Les Saintes, Dominica, Martinique, St. Lucia, St. Vincent and the Grenadines

project.skills: Marine Electrical Systems, Marine Plumbing, Marine Refrigeration, Diesel Mechanics, Fiberglass Work, Woodworking, Rigging, Navigation, Offshore Passage Making, Solar Power Systems, Marine Electronics, LiFePO4 Systems

image.description: Custom teak table with geometric inlay
Salon interior wide view

project.title: FaberNovus
project.subtitle: Multi-Party AI Chat with RAG System
project.description: Advanced multi-party AI chat application featuring document management and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for contextual conversations.

highlights.highlight: Multi-party conversation support
RAG system for context-aware responses
Document management integration
Custom retrieval and embedding pipeline

project.skills: LLM Integration, RAG Architecture, Vector Databases, Full-Stack Development, Document Processing

image.description: Main chat interface showing multi-party conversation
Home page with application overview

project.title: 3D Golf: Swing Sight
project.subtitle: Revolutionary Golf Swing Alignment Tool
project.description: Designed and developed the Swing Sight, a revolutionary 3D printed golf alignment tool that transforms your golf game by eliminating the two most common swing killers: hip sway and over-the-top club path. Patent pending innovation that promotes proper rotation and club path for consistent contact and lower scores.

highlights.highlight: Patent pending golf swing alignment technology
3D printed precision manufacturing
Eliminates hip sway and over-the-top club path
Promotes proper rotation for consistent contact
Professional-grade training tool design

project.skills: 3D Design, 3D Printing, Product Development, Sports Equipment Design, Manufacturing, Patent Filing

image.description: Close-up detail of the Swing Sight alignment tool
Full view of the Swing Sight training tool

project.title: Artwork & Furniture
project.subtitle: Oil Paintings and Custom Woodworking
project.description: Collection of original oil paintings and custom furniture pieces, demonstrating craftsmanship and artistic expression alongside technical work.

highlights.highlight: 20+ original oil paintings on canvas
Custom furniture designs and builds
Traditional woodworking and finishing techniques

project.skills: Oil Painting, Woodworking, Furniture Design, Traditional Joinery, Finishing

interlude.title: Financial Technology Position
interlude.note: Worked in financial technology sector. Development on personal projects paused due to role demands and COVID-19 supply chain disruptions.
